Monday, 15 June 2026 02:59:18

Total Skipped Tests

0

File Information
Collection: Grobase — Offer capability proof (live stack)
Environment: Grobase local (generated by run-postman.sh)
Collection Description
Proves every Grobase OFFER capability works against the LIVE mini-baas stack through Kong (http://127.0.0.1:8002), the control plane (http://127.0.0.1:3022), and the Rust data plane. Each request carries pm.test assertions that check BOTH status AND body shape (never vacuous). Idempotent / re-runnable: a unique tenant slug is minted per run from {{$timestamp}}. SAFE on the live stack: it only CREATES a throwaway test tenant; it never deletes or mutates other tenants. Folders mirror the real verify gates: 10 Provision = scripts/verify/lib-live-tenant.sh; 30/40 Data+Query = m22/m26; 50 Aggregate = m26; 60 Transactions = openapi /query/v1/txn TxnRequest; 80 Storage = m55; 90 Functions = m56; 95 Self-service = m83 (accepts gated 404).
Timings and Data
Total run duration: 24.3s
Total data received: 5.69KB
Average response time: 307ms

Requests 39 0

          ]
        }
